title: Form Submission Notification

posts.author: benschoer (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We have created a form that is used by various internal teams to submit a request for consulting services request.

When the form is submitted a email notification is sent to the form owner (myself) however there is a team that should be triaging these forms, is there any way to notify the 4 team members who should be receiving it?

Only these 4 members subscribe to this board that form collates the responses to.

Thank you

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ben! Great question. Rather than notifying each individual team member in your automation, you create a team for these 4 members and notify the team instead.

image932×1150 80.7 KB

From there, in the left-hand corner of the pop-up screen, select “+ New team” to create the new team!

Above, I’ve linked our Support article on creating teams for you to check out. I encourage you read the article to review the limitations for teams, specifically if your team will include guest users (users can only add guests to teams on the Enterprise Plan), and review more about team owners.

Once you’ve created your team, subscribe the team to your board. You can remove each user as a board member since you have subscribed the team. In your automation, in the “someone” field, you can select the team you’ve created under “Team”:

image950×600 30.3 KB

Let me know if this helps!
